added: First official release — complete rewrite in Kotlin for native Android performance
Integrated yt-dlp engine for downloading from 1000+ supported websites (YouTube, Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook, Reddit, Vimeo, TikTok and many more)
Bundled FFmpeg for seamless video+audio merging, transcoding and post-processing
Download Queue — manage multiple downloads simultaneously with full queue control (pause, resume, reorder, cancel)
Background Downloads — downloads continue even when the app is minimised or screen is off
Download History — complete record of all past downloads with status, metadata and quick re-download option
Video Compressor — compress downloaded videos to reduce file size while preserving quality
Video/Audio Converter — convert between popular formats (MP4, MKV, WebM, MP3, AAC, OPUS and more)
Settings screen — granular control over download directory, concurrency, format preferences, notifications and more
Select video quality from all available resolutions provided by the source
Choose output format: video-only, audio-only, or merged video+audio
Supports virtually any site compatible with yt-dlp
Real-time download progress with speed and ETA indicators
Smart filename sanitisation and duplicate handling
Material You design with dynamic theming (Android 12+)
removed: Removed legacy Kivy/Python runtime (replaced by native Kotlin app)
